display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Wendi McLendon-Covey dukes it out against Matt Walsh; Amanda Kloots and Marcus Lemonis battle for their spot in the winner's circle.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from a penny to millions.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Brooke Burns and Mark "The Beast" Labbett reunite in an exciting showdown; three challengers take on great minds in trivia where the last one standing faces the top-scoring Master Mind for a chance to win big.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Steven, Drahcir, Nate and Kaitlin.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Cute siblings Greg and Bianca go after sweet mom and daughter Jillian and Sam.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Victoria "The Queen" Groce graces the throne once again as the featured chaser, facing off in a battle of the brains against a diversity executive, a mystery writer and a Ph.D. student.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A married couple from Union, N.J., vies for the prize.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Los Angeles, Fallbrook, Calif. and Tucson, Ariz., compete.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Childs Family vs. Sauceda Family; Steve Harvey hosts this long-running classic.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Single Sandy and Jackie battle couple Joseph and Shy.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Alexis, Lynn, Caleb, and Ian compete.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Nursing Home Nightmares 2026
programme.desc: This is a must-see program if you have a loved one in a nursing home; go behind the scenes and find out what really goes on when you're not there, and all that's wrong with today's nursing homes; you will learn exactly what you can do if you.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Deon Cole, D'Arcy Carden, Ken Jennings and Mario Cantone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Ron, Dave, Craig and Mickey.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: BFFs Tiffany and Misha duel mom Amy and daughter Amy.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Brandon "The Lightning Bolt" Blackwell returns as the featured Chaser and goes head-to-head against a heavy metal music enthusiast, a high school teacher and an oncologist.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Two cousins vie for the prize.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Rangers travel south to face the Panthers in a high-stakes match. Florida, the back-to-back Stanley Cup champion, looks to remain the top team in the Eastern Conference. Captain Aleksander Barkov is out for the season because of a major injury.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Fla.

programme.title: Tampa Bay Lightning: Recharge
programme.desc: Following unprecedented back to back Stanley Cup runs, the Tampa Bay Lightning prepare to embark on the pursuit of a third consecutive championship.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Montreal Canadiens and the Tampa Bay Lightning takes place at Benchmark International Arena. The regular-season series was closely contested, with both teams splitting their four meetings 2-2.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Canadiens face the Lightning in Game 2 of the East first round. Montreal leads 1-0 after a 4-3 win April 19. Juraj Slafkovsky had a hat trick, including the overtime winner; Brandon Hagel led Tampa Bay with two goals to force the extra period.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 3 at Bell Centre. After Josh Anderson gave Montreal a 2-1 lead, Nikita Kucherov tied it at 12:33 of the third to force OT. J.J. Moser scored at 12:48 into OT to seal the Lightning's win in Game 2.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 4 of the East first round. Montreal leads 2-1 after a Game 3 win. Brayden Point tied it for Tampa Bay with a power-play goal, but rookie Lane Hutson won it at 2:09 of overtime with a slap shot.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Montreal faces Tampa Bay in Game 5 of the East First Round at Benchmark International Arena. The series remains tied 2-2 after the Lightning won Game 4. Zachary Bolduc and Cole Caufield staked Montreal to an early 2-0 lead before Tampa Bay rallied.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning and the Canadiens continue their series in Game 6 at Bell Centre. Montreal leads 3-2 after a Game 5 win. Brendan Gallagher opened the scoring for Montreal while rookie Jakub Dobes stopped 38 of 40 shots in the 3-2 Game 5 victory.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning host the Canadiens for a decisive Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round. Both teams recorded 106 points in the regular season. Tampa Bay forced this Game 7 with an overtime victory to avoid elimination in Game 6.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Bolts Beginnings
programme.desc: Profiles of Tampa Bay Lightning stars.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Canadiens face the Lightning in Game 2 of the East first round. Montreal leads 1-0 after a 4-3 win April 19. Juraj Slafkovsky had a hat trick, including the overtime winner; Brandon Hagel led Tampa Bay with two goals to force the extra period.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Mike Modano's 500th Career Goal. From March 13, 2007.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Western Conference Semifinals, Game 6. From May 17, 1999.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Nov. 7, 2007.

programme.title: Top Shelf
programme.desc: Great plays don't discriminate but with so many games, it's nearly impossible to catch them all. This show fills in the gaps and keeps fans abreast of the latest eye-popping moves, tricks and stops.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Live: VSiN by the Books
programme.desc: Breaking down the biggest stories in sports betting from the night before and getting you up to speed as a new day begins; we break down the NBA Playoffs, the NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs, MLB, and the kick-off to the WNBA season and more!

programme.title: FIBA World Basketball
programme.desc: Weekly wrap-up of basketball action from around the world including features on the world's top players, leagues and tournaments.

programme.desc: A story of resilience, with a country united behind them, an insight into the team, the players, the coaches and their journey.

programme.title: New York Knicks 2026 Championship Parade
programme.desc: Fans celebrate the New York Knicks' first NBA Championship in 53 years with a ticker-tape parade through the city's "Canyon of Heroes.".

programme.title: R&A - Live at the Range
programme.desc: An inside look into players' preparations, with coverage, statistics and insight from the practice range as competitors fine tune their game.

programme.title: Live: 5 Clubs With Gary Williams
programme.desc: Viewpoints of people in the game with people who love the game; we discuss what is of interest to them in the vast and deep reservoir of stories within the game of golf.

programme.title: Live From The Open
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding The Open focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the ISCO Championship 2026 continues at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville. The final 18-hole loop crowns the champion, awards 300 FedEx Cup points, and determines the distribution of the $4 million total purse.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The final 18-hole loop will crown the champion and determine the division of the $9 million purse. The winner claims $1.62 million and 500 FedEx points.

programme.title: Live From The Open
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding The Open focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: Live: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: Live: PGA TOUR Champions Learning Center
programme.desc: Tips and tricks from the legends of the game.

programme.desc: From Evian Resort Golf Club in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, France.

programme.desc: Players Steven, Drahcir, Nate and Kaitlin.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Cute siblings Greg and Bianca go after sweet mom and daughter Jillian and Sam.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Victoria "The Queen" Groce graces the throne once again as the featured chaser, facing off in a battle of the brains against a diversity executive, a mystery writer and a Ph.D. student.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A married couple from Union, N.J., vies for the prize.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Los Angeles, Fallbrook, Calif. and Tucson, Ariz., compete.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Childs Family vs. Sauceda Family; Steve Harvey hosts this long-running classic.

programme.desc: Single Sandy and Jackie battle couple Joseph and Shy.

programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Nursing Home Nightmares 2026

programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Deon Cole, D'Arcy Carden, Ken Jennings and Mario Cantone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune

programme.desc: Players Ron, Dave, Craig and Mickey.

programme.desc: BFFs Tiffany and Misha duel mom Amy and daughter Amy.

programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Brandon "The Lightning Bolt" Blackwell returns as the featured Chaser and goes head-to-head against a heavy metal music enthusiast, a high school teacher and an oncologist.

programme.desc: Two cousins vie for the prize.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Aston Villa.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Live: Press Conference
programme.desc: Join us live at the AXA Training Centre for Andoni Iraola's first press conference as the head coach of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2018/19 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Cody Gakpo.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Luis Suarez scored for the Reds.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Press Conference
programme.desc: Join us at the AXA Training Centre for Andoni Iraola's first press conference as the head coach of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: One Week In May...
programme.desc: The Story Of A Unique Treble: A documentary about the unforgettable 2000/01 season when Gerard Houllier¿s team charged to three trophies and Champions League qualification for the first time.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: How a young lad from Huyton became a football icon and possibly the best player ever to wear a red shirt of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: Rush Scored Four
programme.desc: An LFC Original mini-documentary that relives the unforgettable afternoon at Goodison in 1982 when Ian Rush inspired the Reds to a famous 5-0 derby victory.

programme.title: Lucas: 10 Years a Red
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017 Lucas Leiva called time on his Liverpool career and moved to Lazio. This documentary looks back on the popular Brazilian's decade at the club.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Steven Gerrard joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 2005 Champions league Final.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Aston Villa.

programme.title: Carragher
programme.desc: Upon his retirement in 2013, Jamie Carragher's former teammates, managers and opponents paid tribute to a true Anfield legend.

programme.title: Double Winners '86
programme.desc: On The March With Kenny's Army: A feature-length documentary telling the story of Liverpool's unforgettable 1985/86 double-winning season.

programme.title: How The Cup Was Won
programme.desc: Enjoy this round-by-round step back in time to the year Liverpool clinched their sixth success in the world's oldest knockout competition.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born & Red
programme.desc: Three men who helped nurture a 9-year-old Steven Gerrard into one of the world's finest players talk in-depth about his development.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2017/18 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Real Madrid.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: Bugsy Moran
programme.desc: A tribute to Liverpool's Sergeant Major. A documentary looking back on the illustrious Anfield career of Bootroom legend Ronnie Moran.

programme.desc: Join us at the AXA Training Centre for Andoni Iraola's first press conference as the head coach of Liverpool FC.

programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: Red Sox: On This Day
programme.desc: From 2014. Clay Buchholz pitches a complete game shutout, striking out 12 Astros, while giving up only 3 hits, and Brock Holt collects a career-best 5 hits, including a leadoff HR to power the Red Sox past the Astros.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Lizette Salas sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss her story as a first-generation college graduate, daughter of Mexican immigrants, and member of USC's Women's Golf Team. She shares her experience and struggles of belonging in the world of golf while competing at the top of the sport, ultimately becoming a trailblazer paving the way for generations to come.

programme.desc: Drew Peterson scored a career-high 27 points to help lead the 21st-ranked Trojans to a 67-64 victory over the 12th-ranked Bruins. From Feb. 12, 2022.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: Caleb Williams passed for a career-high 470 yards and scored three touchdowns to lead the 7th-ranked Trojans to victory over the 16th-ranked Bruins. From Nov. 19, 2022.

programme.desc: Rutger McGroarty scored two goals to help the 2nd-seeded Wolverines beat the top-seeded Golden Gophers by a score of 4-3 to become back-to-back Big Ten Champions. From March 18, 2023.

programme.title: Michigan Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Yaxel Lendeborg made the tiebreaking 3-pointer with .4 seconds remaining to lift the top-seeded Wolverines to a 68-65 victory over the 5th-seeded Badgers to advance to the Big Ten title game. From March 14, 2026.

programme.desc: From March 12, 2017.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: Prosvent is a doctor-formulated blend of rejuvenating herbs and nutrients that help protect overall prostate health.

programme.desc: An inside look at the Chicago Blackhawks, as Pat Boyle and Charlie Roumeliotis deliver the latest news, interviews, and behind-the-scenes updates throughout the season.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From English Field in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Virginia Tech Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Virginia Tech Hokies.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Gators (8-1) try to preserve their perfect SEC/ACC Challenge record as they visit the Hokies (6-2). Florida leads the all-time series 3-1 after the programs split a home-and-home set in 2013 and 2014. Virginia Tech is 5-0 at home this season.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Thompson Field in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Virginia Tech Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Virginia Tech Hokies.

programme.desc: From English Field in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Tech Softball Park in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: Action from college wrestling matches and tournaments.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Virginia Tech Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Virginia Tech Hokies.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Cavaliers visit the Hokies at Cassell Coliseum for the first Commonwealth clash this season. Both teams are highly ranked, with Virginia losing only one match this season and Tech losing two. Forward Amani Hansberry leads the home offense.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: From Cassell Coliseum in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: From Lawrence Joel Veterans Memorial Coliseum in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From David F. Couch Ballpark in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: College Field Hockey
programme.desc: From Kentner Stadium in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Spry Stadium in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Mustangs (5-2, 3-0 ACC) play the Demon Deacons (4-2, 1-2) for the first time in 50 years. SMU has won three in a row after a 35-24 verdict at Clemson on Oct. 18. Kevin Jennings (SMU) is among the nation's leaders with 17 passing TDs in 2025.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Spry Stadium in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From David F. Couch Ballpark in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: Women's College Volleyball
programme.desc: From Reynolds Gymnasium in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Demon Deacons enjoy home state advantage when they face the Bulldogs in the Duke's Mayo Bowl. Wake Forest is 11-6 all-time in bowl games, but lost in this contest in 2020. Mississippi State is 15-11 in the postseason, and won this event in 2015.
